summary: The discv5 network stack ID divergence is semicolon-only rustfmt noise; no chain-to-network-stack mapping behavior changed.
notes: Queue entry verified as line 126: M	crates/net/discv5/src/network_stack_id.rs.
The isolated patch only changes `return Some(Self::OPEL)` and `return Some(Self::ETH)` to semicolon-terminated forms.
No optimism/ethereum chain detection, returned stack ID, or fallback None behavior changed.
